action_set_definitions.name: fetch_system_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the recent SCADA system logs to identify the unique hardware verification code required for system unlock.

action_set_definitions.name: authorize_access
action_set_definitions.description: Authenticates the session using a hardware verification code to enable manual control of aerators and heating systems.

verification_code.description: The alphanumeric code retrieved from the system logs.

example_output.message: Manual override for Sector 4 is now active.

action_set_definitions.name: get_tank_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time sensor data from the salmon tank, including temperature, oxygen levels, and chemical concentrations.

action_set_definitions.name: set_aeration_level
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the VFD aerator power setting to increase or decrease dissolved oxygen levels.

intensity.description: The power setting for the aerator (0-10).

action_set_definitions.name: toggle_heating_system
action_set_definitions.description: Activates or deactivates the heater to control water temperature.

active.description: Set to true to turn heater on, false to turn it off.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_water_exchange
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates a fresh water exchange to flush the tank and reduce the concentration of ammonia and other waste products.

volume_percentage.description: The percentage of tank water to be replaced with fresh water.

state_description.water_temperature: The current temperature of the water in degrees Celsius.
state_description.dissolved_oxygen: Concentration of oxygen dissolved in water (mg/L).
state_description.ph_level: The acidity or alkalinity of the water (0-14 scale).
state_description.ammonia_concentration: Level of total ammonia nitrogen in the water (ppm).
state_description.aerator_intensity: The power setting of the oxygenation system (0 for off, 10 for max).
state_description.heater_active: Indicates if the water heating element is currently drawing power.
state_description.fish_metabolic_rate: Current activity level of the fish population (low, medium, high).
state_description.last_feeding_timestamp: Minutes elapsed since the last feeding action.
